assembly_instructions: Mobile variant of Japan's satellite EM-interference awareness system. Mounted on an Isuzu GIGA truck: operator cabin forward, shelter module with equipment racks aft, telescoping antenna mast with wideband survey antennas, and a small steerable dish for satellite-link monitoring.

info.japanese_name: 電磁妨害状況把握装置2型
info.english_name: Electromagnetic Interference Situation Awareness Device, Type 2
info.summary: Truck-mounted version of the JASDF satellite EM-interference monitoring system, built by NEC and carried on eight Isuzu GIGA heavy trucks.
info.description: Type 2 is the mobile variant of the 電磁妨害状況把握装置 family — a system Japan's Ministry of Defense procures to monitor electromagnetic interference targeting Japanese artificial satellites and to train and evaluate Air Self-Defense Force responses to jamming of communications satellites. Where Type 1 is a fixed ground installation, Type 2 is deployable: the sensor chain, signal-processing racks, and operator consoles ride in a shelter on a large Isuzu truck, letting units move the receiver close to the region of interest or disperse for survivability. The main equipment contract went to NEC in FY2022, and eight Isuzu GIGA trucks were contracted separately in FY2023 as the prime-mover platform.

facts.label: Role
facts.value: Detect and characterise EM interference against Japanese satellites

facts.label: Procuring body
facts.value: Acquisition, Technology & Logistics Agency (防衛装備庁)

sources.title: JM2040 — 防衛装備庁、電磁妨害状況把握装置を契約

parts.name: Isuzu GIGA Chassis
parts.role: Heavy-duty 10-ton truck chassis carrying the shelter and all mounted equipment.

parts.name: Driver Cabin
parts.role: Two-seat driver cabin for road transit.

parts.name: Windshield
parts.role: Cabin windshield.

parts.name: Equipment Shelter
parts.role: EMI-shielded cargo-box shelter enclosing the signal-processing racks and operator consoles.

parts.name: Rear Access Door
parts.role: Rear personnel access door.

parts.name: Signal Processing Rack
parts.role: 19-inch rack housing SDR receivers, spectrum analysers, and correlator hardware.

parts.name: Operator Console
parts.role: Analyst workstation for tasking, display, and tactical reporting.

parts.name: Console Display
parts.role: Waterfall / spectrum display.

parts.name: Auxiliary Generator
parts.role: Diesel-driven inverter generator providing clean mains while stationary.

parts.name: Telescopic Antenna Mast
parts.role: Pneumatic mast lifting survey antennas above terrain clutter.

parts.name: Wideband Discone
parts.role: Omnidirectional survey antenna, 25 MHz – 3 GHz.

parts.name: Log-Periodic Array
parts.role: Directional L/S-band array for bearing estimation.

parts.name: GNSS Reference Antenna
parts.role: Time/position reference for coherent capture and geotagging.

parts.name: Steerable Ku-Band Dish
parts.role: Steerable parabolic dish for direct monitoring of downlinks from Japanese communications satellites.

parts.name: Az/El Pedestal
parts.role: Two-axis positioner aiming the dish at target spacecraft.

parts.name: Wheel FL
parts.role: Front left wheel.

parts.name: Wheel FR
parts.role: Front right wheel.

parts.name: Wheel ML
parts.role: Middle left wheel.

parts.name: Wheel MR
parts.role: Middle right wheel.

parts.name: Wheel RL
parts.role: Rear left wheel.

parts.name: Wheel RR
parts.role: Rear right wheel.
